## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Link related issues with "Fixes #123" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI or tooling
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests only

## Labels (maintainers will apply)

Pick what fits. Comment if unsure.

| Label | When to use |
|-------|-------------|
| `bug` | Fixes incorrect behavior |
| `enhancement` | New feature or improvement |
| `documentation` | README or docs only |
| `typescript` | Detection rules or edge cases |
| `cli` | Flags, output, or UX |
| `ci` | GitHub Actions or workflows |
| `dependencies` | npm package updates |
| `performance` | Speed or memory |
| `good first issue` | Small, newcomer-friendly change |
| `help wanted` | Needs review or extra discussion |

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm test` locally
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck` locally
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I updated docs when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] My change is focused (no unrelated edits)
